raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.3,"RX.2":0.3,"RX.3":0.3,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation to 'clean this up' centers on improving the grammar, flow, conciseness, and register of the research draft at the sentence and paragraph level, making this dimension load-bearing.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is a peripheral nice-to-have in cleaning up the draft to ensure responsible communication of limitations and results.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is peripherally relevant to prevent exaggerated statements during the cleaning process.","RX.3":"Scope adherence ensures the cleaned draft stays within the intended boundaries of the proposed controller, as a nice-to-have aspect.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is considered peripherally to mitigate any potential misuse implications in the controller's description.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is a peripheral responsibility to maintain accuracy in any referenced elements during cleanup."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation to 'clean this up' centers on improving the grammar, flow, conciseness, and register of the research draft at the sentence and paragraph level, making this dimension load-bearing.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is a peripheral nice-to-have in cleaning up the draft to ensure responsible communication of limitations and results.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is peripherally relevant to prevent exaggerated statements during the cleaning process.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence ensures the cleaned draft stays within the intended boundaries of the proposed controller, as a nice-to-have aspect.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is considered peripherally to mitigate any potential misuse implications in the controller's description.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is a peripheral responsibility to maintain accuracy in any referenced elements during cleanup.
